text.title: Load Balancing Concepts Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: profile-traffic
step.action: Capture RPS, p95 latency, concurrent connections, payload size distribution, protocol mix.
step.decision-gate: If profile is unavailable, generate one with a synthetic load test before continuing.

step.name: pick-layer
step.action: Apply layer-choice rule: any header / path / cookie / SSL-termination requirement → L7; else L4.

step.name: pick-algorithm
step.action: Apply algorithm-choice rule: heterogeneous backends or long-lived connections → dynamic; else static.

step.name: configure-health-checks
step.action: Apply health-check-shape rule: HTTP GET /health, interval 15 s, timeout 5 s, thresholds 2/3.
step.decision-gate: If /health endpoint missing, BLOCK until app team ships it.

step.name: decide-persistence
step.action: Apply session-externalisation rule: default externalised store; sticky only with documented fallback.

step.name: design-ha-topology
step.action: Apply ha-no-spof rule: SLO ≥ 99.9 → active-passive min; ≥ 99.95 → active-active; multi-region → GSLB.
